overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark robes walking through a mountainous valley landscape. The scene features overcast skies, rocky terrain, tall grass, and scattered stone ruins as the character progresses along a dirt path through increasingly open terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain valley with rocky cliffs and tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the narrow rocky valley with tall grass on both sides

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face lining the left side of the narrow valley path
dense tall grass and reeds growing along the right side of the path
distant mountain peaks visible through the valley under overcast skies
narrow dirt trail winding through the valley floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow mountain valley enclosed by rocky cliffs on the left and dense tall grass on the right. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting over the dirt path as distant mountains loom ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with windmill and wildflowers

events.description: windmill structure becomes visible in the distance ahead
character passes the windmill structure on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the valley opens up, passing a windmill structure and approaching stone walls

entered.detail: tall wooden windmill with rotating blades standing in the open valley
ancient stone wall running parallel to the path on the left side
clusters of white wildflowers growing alongside the path
ruined stone structures visible in the far distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The valley opens up to reveal a wide landscape with a windmill ahead. The character passes the windmill as stone walls appear on the left and white wildflowers line the right side of the path. Distant ruins become visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with ancient stone ruins and walls

events.description: ancient stone ruins become more prominent on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the open valley approaching ancient ruins with stone walls continuing along the left side

entered.detail: loose rocks and boulders scattered along the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the wide open valley as the stone walls recede into the mid-distance on the left. Ancient ruins grow larger on the right side while the windmill fades into the distance behind. The landscape becomes rockier with scattered boulders.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow mountain pass that gradually expands into a wide, ruin-strewn valley. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path enclosed by steep rocky cliffs and dense tall grass under a diffused, overcast sky. As the valley opens up, the camera passes a windmill and follows the path where stone walls emerge on the left and white wildflowers bloom on the right. The scene then shifts toward a more open landscape as the windmill recedes and the stone walls fade into the mid-distance. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rocky with scattered boulders as the camera approaches ancient ruins that grow larger on the right horizon.
